name: tts
description: Synthesize text to speech audio. Use when the user asks for an audio/voice response or wants text read aloud. Returns the audio as a workstream attachment that the client can play.

text.description: The text to synthesize into speech.

voice.description: Optional voice identifier (e.g. 'alloy', 'echo', 'fable', 'onyx', 'nova', 'shimmer'). Defaults to the server-configured voice.
